top_signals.title: US Futures Climb as Iran Deal Counters Hawkish Fed: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US equity futures rose and oil prices retreated as President Donald Trump signed an interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, boosting risk sentiment after the Federal Reserve’s hawkish hold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil and Gas Ships Cross Strait of Hormuz After US-Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: A laden liquefied natural gas carrier and an empty products tanker are crossing the Strait of Hormuz, as traders watch for signs of traffic through the key waterway after an interim US-Iran peace deal went into effect.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump signs memo aimed at ending Iran war, White House official says - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump signs memo aimed at ending Iran war, White House official says  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Patch Tuesday, May 2026 Edition
top_signals.summary: Artificial intelligence platforms may be just as susceptible to social engineering as human beings, but they are proving remarkably good at finding security vulnerabilities in human-made computer code. That reality is on full display this month with some of the more widely-used software makers -- including Apple, Google, Microsoft, Mozilla and Oracle -- fixing near record volumes of security bugs, and/or quickening the tempo of their patch releases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kingboard’s 570% Rally Is Being Powered by Mainland Investors
top_signals.summary: Chinese investors have fueled a surge in shares of newfound AI darling Kingboard Laminates Holdings Ltd., more than doubling their stake in the company to 13% this year, according to the latest stock exchange data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Buying bitcoin below its 200-week average has historically delivered over 100% in median returns, Kraken says
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Traders now see Fed raising rates by September - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Traders now see Fed raising rates by September  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: XRP slips 4% below $1.20 after breakout rally stalls near key resistance
Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
top_signals.summary: Lawmakers in both houses of Congress are demanding answers from the U.S. Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) after KrebsOnSecurity reported this week that a CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and a vast trove of other agency secrets on a public GitHub account. The inquiry comes as CISA is still struggling to contain the breach and invalidate the leaked credentials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
